Bash(echo 'None found' __NEW_LINE_67648d9f333fedf0__ echo -e "\\n=== SOT cues with ''''spier'''' in database ===" docker exec show-build-postgres psql -U showbuild -d showbuild -t -c "
SELECT script_content
FROM rundown_items ri 
JOIN rundowns r ON ri.rundown_id = r.id 
JOIN episodes e ON r.episode_id = e.id 
WHERE e.episode_number = 257
  AND ri.script_content LIKE ''''%spier%''''
ORDER BY ri.order_in_rundown;
")
